display.purpose: Editorial headings — brings warmth and sophistication

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button — dark background, white text
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1c1917; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(28, 25, 23, 0.3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Subtle secondary action — transparent with muted text
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #a8a29e; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #ffffff; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content card — flat white with subtle border
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 2px; padding: 16px; transition: border-color 0.3s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #a8a29e; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; color: #1c1917; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field — bordered, rounded, clean
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1c1917; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a8a29e; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #a8a29e; outline: 2px solid rgba(28, 25, 23, 0.3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; background: #f5f5f4; color: #57534e; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 2px; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; cursor: default; } .ds-tag:hover { background: #e7e5e4; }

narrative.overview: A quiet digital notebook for personal knowledge — not social performance. This design system recedes entirely, letting saved content take center stage. The interface should feel like a well-worn, well-organized library: sophisticated, deep, and deeply personal. Nothing competes for attention.
keyCharacteristics: Content first — the UI fades away
Warm stone palette with sophisticated depth
Flat by default, tonal shifts on interaction
Playfair Display for editorial elegance, DM Sans for readability
2px radius for cards, 8px for interactive elements

rules.name: The Restraint Rule
rules.body: Accent colors appear only in platform badges to identify content type. The system is primarily monochrome.

rules.name: The Typography Rule
rules.body: Headings use Playfair Display for editorial warmth. Everything else uses DM Sans.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Elevation comes only from tonal shifts in background and border, never from shadows.

dos: Do use the warm stone background (#fafaf9) — never pure white for the page background
Do use 2px radius on cards and tags — keep them sharp and editorial
Do use 8px radius on interactive elements (buttons, inputs)
Do use Playfair Display for headings — it adds the editorial warmth
Do use DM Sans for body text — it's readable and invisible
Do use platform accent colors only in small badges
donts: Don't use shadows — this is a flat design
Don't use gradients — no decorative treatments
Don't use glassmorphism — no blurs or transparency layers
Don't use border-left or border-right as accent stripes
Don't use gradient text — solid colors only
Don't make cards larger than needed — content first
